channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 77/100 (critical)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 77/100 (critical). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 71.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer grapples with leadership crisis

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer prepares for King's Speech as he faces leadership crisis
item.description: Starmer prepares for King's Speech as he faces leadership crisis

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer must go before next election, say Labour-backing unions

item.title: ITVX: Streeting leaves No 10 after crunch talks with Starmer last less than 20 minutes - ITVX
